art_highlights: Art Central 2026 opens in Hong Kong (March 25-29), the largest edition yet with 117 galleries.
25th Biennale of Sydney, 'Rememory', exploring memory and inheritance.
Major exhibitions: Heinz Mack at 95 (Düsseldorf), Elizabeth Murray at MoMA, and 'Making Their Mark' at NMWA.
Global art market shows 'cautiously optimistic' 4% growth in 2025, driven by high-end and auction recovery.

market_trends.summary: Global markets show cautious recovery but face volatility; art market structural reset continues.
key_points: Art Basel & UBS 2026 report: 4% sales growth in 2025 (USD 59.6B).
Impressionist and Modern art segments saw significant 47% value growth.
Art fair sales recovering to 35% of dealer turnover.
High-end auction market rebounding with 9% growth in public sales.
